Source   Edit  

Blockade System Engine Implements blockade mechanics from operations.md Section 6.2.6

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../gamestate, ../fleet, ../intelligence/blockade_intel

Procs

proc applyBlockades(state: var GameState) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Apply blockade status to all colonies Called at start of Income Phase Per operations.md:6.2.6: "Blockades established during the Conflict Phase reduce GCO for that same turn's Income Phase calculation" Source   Edit   
proc calculateBlockadePrestigePenalty(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Calculate prestige penalty for colonies under blockade Per operations.md:6.2.6: "House Prestige is reduced by 2 points for each turn if the colony begins the income phase under blockade"

Returns total prestige penalty (negative value)

Source   Edit   
proc canBreakBlockade(state: GameState; systemId: SystemId; reliefFleet: Fleet): bool {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Check if a relief fleet can break a blockade Per operations.md:6.2.6: Blockading fleets engage relief forces under order 05 (Guard/Blockade)

Returns true if relief fleet has sufficient strength

Source   Edit   
proc getBlockadedColonies(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): seq[Colony] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get all colonies owned by a house that are currently blockaded Source   Edit   
proc getBlockadePenalty(colony: Colony): float {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Get the GCO multiplier for a blockaded colony Per operations.md:6.2.6: "Colonies under blockade reduce their GCO by 60%"

Returns multiplier (0.4 = 60% reduction)

Source   Edit   
proc getBlockadingFleets(state: GameState; systemId: SystemId): seq[Fleet] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get all fleets that are blockading a system Source   Edit   
proc isSystemBlockaded(state: GameState; systemId: SystemId;
                       colonyOwner: HouseId): (bool, seq[HouseId]) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Check if a system is currently blockaded by hostile forces Returns (isBlockaded, blockadingHouses)

Per operations.md:6.2.6: "Fleets are ordered to blockade an enemy planet and do not engage in Space Combat unless confronted by enemy ships under order 05"

Multiple empires can blockade the same planet if all are hostile to the colony owner. Blockade effects stack (still 60% reduction, but multiple houses contribute to the blockade).

Source   Edit
